scope: ONE line: what this repo is for. /dispatch checks each new problem against this and flags a mismatch for confirmation (wrong-repo tripwire).
_posture_doc: quiet|standard|strict -- CEREMONY LOUDNESS ONLY (read at the gating layer; verification strength is identical in all three). DEFAULT is standard: the Stop gate blocks a session that lacks a fresh PASS, so the guarantee holds out of the box. quiet downgrades the gate to report-only (no dispatch lifecycle required) -- an explicit opt-down, not the default, because a gate that only reports is advisory. strict: standard + the trust-layer/fingerprint discipline (trust layer agent-read-only; a changed governor certifies nothing until run_eval.sh re-proves and re-stamps).
_flaky_doc: quarantine lane (Job 9b): flaky_glob = a dir the GATED test_cmd does NOT collect; move a flaky test there + declare it in rails/verifier/flaky_lane.json. flaky_cmd runs the lane NON-GATING. flaky_runs = re-runs for flaky_triage.sh. Empty flaky_glob = off (zero footprint).
_notify_doc: Push surfacing (Job 4C): rails/notify/notify.sh, default OFF -- token-less installs untouched. Token via TELEGRAM_RAILS_BOT_TOKEN + TELEGRAM_RAILS_CHAT_ID env vars ONLY (use a DEDICATED bot; never reuse another bot's token); never written to any file. One line per event: repo, event, artifact path -- no payloads, diffs, or secrets. Wired callers today: run_observer.sh (observer_filed, batched per run) and doctor.sh (stamp_invalidated); the other listed events are reserved hook points, not yet wired -- verify.sh (the gate) stays clean of notify by design.
